title: agropyron spicatum var. vaseyi
intro: Agropyron spicatum var. vaseyi, also known as Vasey's bluegrass or Vasey blue grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the wheat grass family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agropyron spicatum var. vaseyi include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its potential to help lower cholesterol levels and improve blood sugar control. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be consumed as a juice or added to food products.
